packages.description: A lightweight and flexible web server inspired by Shelf for building APIs and backend services.
The standard Dart HTTP server implementation, using the `dart:io` library.

Serinus is a framework for building robust and scalable Dart server-side applications. It leverges the power of OOP and the flexibility of Dart to provide a simple and efficient way to build server-side applications.

features.title: Just Return
features.description: Return anything from handlers: Strings, Maps, Lists, Streams, Files, Futures. Zero boilerplate.

features.title: Specialized Tools
features.description: Hooks, Exception Filters, and Pipes. Full control over your application flow.

features.title: Real-time Ready
features.description: WebSockets and SSE built-in. Push updates instantly with zero config.

features.title: Universal Adapters
features.description: REST APIs, Microservices, and more. Same framework, different adapters.

features.title: Type-Safe
features.description: Leverage Dart's type system. Catch errors at compile time, not runtime.

features.title: OpenAPI Native
features.description: Unique in Dart. Generate complete API docs with just one import.

packages.description: A model for web server middleware that encourages composition and easy reuse.
The standard Dart HTTP server implementation, using the `dart:io` library.
